subcodes.first_line: O Thou Sustainer of earth and heaven, Supporter of the chosen ones and Guide of the sagacious! Thou dost confirm whomsoever Thou willest unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا قیوم الارض و السماء و موید الاصفیا و موفق الاذکیاء توید من تشاء علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
